main_datasets.name: Main Figure: Reference-Aware Qualitative Comparisons
main_datasets.description: Reference-aware rows from the main paper across CelebA-Test-Ref, FFHQ-Ref Moderate, FFHQ-Ref Severe, and CelebHQRef100.
main_datasets.label: fig:qual_ref_compact

main_datasets.name: Main Figure: No-Reference Qualitative Comparisons

main_datasets.name: Main Figure: Reference-Aware Ablations
main_datasets.description: Main-paper ablation rows showing the effect of structure, identity, and two-route degraded memory.
main_datasets.label: fig:iconface_ablation_ref_compact

supplementary_datasets.name: Reference-GT Gap: CelebA-Test-Ref
